known_ranges.label: Folk Magic
known_ranges.reason: Existing folk magic raw records cite Mythras Core, but complete page/block evidence is outside this Phase 1 source-discovery unit.

known_ranges.label: Animism
known_ranges.reason: Existing animism raw records cite Mythras Core; access-model research and accepted fact promotion require bounded evidence plus independent verification.

known_ranges.label: Mysticism
known_ranges.reason: Mysticism pages 155-161 have bounded extraction and independent verification for chargen-relevant Core rules; app access remains blocked until provider evidence exists.

known_ranges.label: Sorcery
known_ranges.reason: Existing sorcery raw records include verified legacy coverage; future changes still require bounded source evidence.

blockers: Only Mythras Core Mysticism pages 155-161 and boundary page 196 have bounded extraction and independent verification.
Other Mythras Core magic and rules pages remain pending until separately scoped Beads verify them.
notes: All-page scaffold generated for Mythras Core; bounded Mysticism evidence is verified for pages 155-161 plus boundary page 196.
verified_scope: App-facing Mythras Core page ranges used by current inline constants and reference JSON; non-target pages remain pending scaffolds.
